info.title: Helsa API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the Helsa application API routes, excluding auth and workflow endpoints.

get.description: Requires an authenticated session. Admin users resolve billing by organization.
Requires an authenticated session. Admin users resolve orders by organization.

post.description: Requires an authenticated session. Starts or continues an agent-backed chat and streams UI output.

200.description: Patients associated with the authenticated doctor.

get.description: Returns the hosted checkout experience from Polar.
Uses the current authenticated session to resolve the Polar customer portal.

post.description: Polar webhook endpoint validated with the configured webhook secret.

BadRequest.description: Request validation failed or the domain rejected the input.

Forbidden.description: The authenticated user is not allowed to perform this operation.
